mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verify_code(email, code, scene, user_id, expire_time, used) VALUES(#{email}, #{code}, #{scene}, #{userId}, #{expireTime}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM email_verify_code WHERE email = #{email} AND scene = #{scene} AND code = #{code} AND used = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verify_code SET used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
